_comment: PDF manual manifest (cat3). Location: src/cat3/pdf_manifest.json (this is CONFIGURATION, it lives with the code). Drop the PDFs into data/cat3/raw/manuals/<robot_id>/ -- any .pdf filename is accepted, no renaming needed. target_filename is only a preference when several PDFs sit in the same folder.

_decision.subject: Inclusion of vendor manuals in the cat3 corpus
_decision.decision: allow_no_license=true is frozen entry by entry in this file for the manuals MANUALLY DOWNLOADED by the user.
_decision.scope: Only the entries of this manifest whose allow_no_license is true. It widens neither the license_utils.py allowlist, nor the URDF path, nor any other category.
rationale: The brief explicitly authorises this route for cat3: 'Vendor manuals (Unitree / AgileX): do NOT scrape or redistribute -- download the PDF, extract text locally, internal-training use only.'
No automated download, no authentication bypass: the files are placed by hand by the user.
Strictly internal use (DAPT training), no redistribution of the corpus.
Exception foreseen by the project rules (license barrier) for manually downloaded PDFs.
_decision.consequence: These documents stay tagged license='no-license' in corpus_clean.jsonl: the corpus consumer can filter them out at any time. The decision is reproducible without passing a command-line option, unlike --allow-proprietary-pdf.
_decision.reversibility: Set allow_no_license back to false on the entries concerned, then re-run build_corpus.py: the manuals leave the corpus and are logged as set aside.

manuals.note: Scanned PDF (1 image page, no text layer): requires --ocr.

manuals.license_note: Proprietary (c) UR -- publicly downloadable, redistribution restricted
Proprietary (c) AgileX -- consistent with the no-license status of the URDF
POSSIBLY OPEN -- Bitcraze documentation is often CC-BY, TO BE CONFIRMED, then fill in license_spdx

_license: license_spdx=null => classified 'no-license'. By default such a document is EXCLUDED. It is included only if allow_no_license=true on the entry (per-robot decision, traced here) or if build_corpus.py is run with --allow-proprietary-pdf (global decision, NOT traced in a file: avoid).
